file: 989_Wang 等 - 2014 - Liquid Fuel Production by Aqueous Phase Catalytic Transformation of Biomass for Aviation.txt

experiments.description: 在280°C、WHSV 1.25 h⁻¹、GHSV 2500 h⁻¹和4.0 MPa氢气压力条件下，使用10%Ni@HZSM-5/MCM-41催化剂对葡萄糖、山梨醇和木糖醇/山梨醇混合多元醇进行水相催化反应，生产液体燃料
experiments.text_snippet: With glucose, sorbitol and mixed polyol/sorbitol (40%xylitol+60%sorbitol) as feedstocks, the aqueous-phase catalytic reactions were carried out under 280°C, WHSV of 1.25 h-1, GHSV of 2500 h-1 and 4.0 MPa hydrogen pressure.

Catalyst composition.original: 10%Ni@HZSM-5/MCM-41 (HZSM-5 and MCM-41 weight ratio 6:4, Si/Al atomic ratio 38)

Product Selectivity.original: {'Gaseous products': ['CH₄: 45.8-53.7%', 'C₂H₆: 5.0-5.9%', 'C₃H₈: 5.7-6.0%', 'C₄H₁₀: 3.4-4.7%', 'C₅H₁₃: 3.2-3.9%', 'C₆H₁₄: 1.4-1.9%', 'CO₂: 11.7-13.6%', 'C₇+ alkanes: 13.7-20.0%'], 'Liquid products': ['Substituted benzenes: 35.4-39.5%', 'Naphthalenes: 5.8-13.6%', 'Aromatic olefins: 32.6-38.1%', 'Oxygenates: 11.0-21.3%'], 'Aqueous phase': ['Glycol: 11.8-22.8%', '1,2-propanediol: 6.4-18.2%', '1,3-propanediol: 0-1.4%', 'Isopropanol: 17.8-43.2%', 'Isosorbide: 34.8-44.3%', 'Sorbitol: 1.6-4.1%']}

experiments.experiment_description: 在280°C、WHSV 1.25 h⁻¹、GHSV 2500 h⁻¹和4.0 MPa氢气压力条件下，使用10%Ni@HZSM-5/MCM-41催化剂对葡萄糖、山梨醇和木糖醇/山梨醇混合多元醇进行水相催化反应，生产液体燃料
experiments.text_snippet: With glucose, sorbitol and mixed polyol/sorbitol (40%xylitol+60%sorbitol) as feedstocks, the aqueous-phase catalytic reactions were carried out under 280°C, WHSV of 1.25 h-1, GHSV of 2500 h-1 and 4.0 MPa hydrogen pressure.
